creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
(In reply to comment #25)
> Like the ports@ address is a redirection address to freebsd-ports mailing
> list:
> https://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-ports
Actually, not. The ports@ address is a redirection address to freebsd-bugs@ mailing list:
https://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-bugs

The freebsd-ports@ mailing list is for other purposes.
